prompt: Create a warm rustic food-photography poster for a Spanish potato omelette, featuring a perfectly round golden-brown tortilla de patatas centered on a large cream ceramic plate with cobalt-blue floral patterns. A triangular slice has been cut out and pulled slightly forward to the lower right, revealing thick layered potato and egg inside; the omelette surface is glossy, browned, and textured, with a small sprig of fresh thyme on top. Use an overhead three-quarter view, shallow depth of field, natural window light, rich appetizing color grading, and a cozy Mediterranean kitchen-table atmosphere. Surround the plate with exactly 6 supporting props: 3 whole potatoes on burlap in the upper left, 1 small bowl of fresh green herbs in the upper right, 1 glass bottle of olive oil at the far upper right, 1 small bowl of coarse salt at the lower left, plus scattered parsley leaves on the linen cloth. Add exactly 3 handwritten text blocks in elegant white and beige script: large title at upper left reading Tortilla de Patatas with a small heart doodle, small lower-left caption reading Simple. Honesta. Deliciosa., and small lower-right caption reading Hecha con amor with a heart and underline. Keep the composition premium, realistic, inviting, editorial, and restaurant-quality, with crisp focus on the omelette and softly blurred background details.
